NULISAseqR 1.5.0

Compute Summary Statistics Row for Detectability Values

Source: R/detectability.R
format_detectability_stats_row.Rd

Creates a single-row character matrix of formatted summary statistics for a set of detectability values. Used internally by format_detectability_report().

format_detectability_stats_row(detectability_values, type_label, sample_number)

Arguments

detectability_values

Numeric vector of detectability percentages, already filtered for any noDetectability targets. Names are optional.

type_label

Character string label for this row (e.g., "all" or a sample group name).

sample_number

Integer number of samples.

Value

A 1-row character matrix with columns: type, \# samples, mean, sd, median, min, max, \# of detectable targets (%). When all values are NA or the vector is empty, stat columns contain empty strings.

Contents
